text: 🇺🇸 ⚔️ 🇮🇷 Another tanker turned around in the Strait of Hormuz, however this one was trying to transit via the Iranian approved route. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚔️ 🇮🇷 霍尔木兹海峡又有一艘油轮掉头，但这一艘是试图通过伊朗批准的航线。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 The IDF released footage of a strike on a Hezbollah rocket launching position in southern Lebanon. They report to have destroyed about 10 launchers so far. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 以色列国防军发布了打击黎巴嫩南部真主党火箭发射阵地的视频。据报道，他们迄今已摧毁了约10个发射器。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 WSJ: The White House has warned staff not to place bets on prediction markets amid the Iran war following suspiciously timed trades tied to U.S. policy shifts. The warning comes after a surge in oil futures trading shortly before a strike pause announcement and reports of large profits from correctly timed ceasefire bets, though officials say there is no evidence of insider trading. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 《华尔街日报》：白宫已警告工作人员，在伊朗战争期间不要在预测市场上进行投注，此前曾出现与美国政策转变时间点高度吻合的可疑交易。这一警告是在石油期货交易在停火声明发布前激增，以及有报道称通过精准把握停火投注时间获得巨额利润之后发出的，尽管官员们表示没有证据表明存在内幕交易。 @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 🇱🇧 ⚡ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 Qalibaf: Time is running out ...
text_zh: 🇮🇷 🇱🇧 ⚡ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 卡利巴夫：时间不多了……

text: ⚡️ 🇨🇦 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 Canadian Foreign Minister Anand condemned Israel's strikes on Lebanon, urging them to respect Lebanon's territorial sovereignty. She also called on Hezbollah to disarm immediately and respect the decisions by the Lebanese government. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇨🇦 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 加拿大外交部长阿南德谴责以色列对黎巴嫩的袭击，敦促其尊重黎巴嫩的领土主权。她还呼吁真主党立即解除武装，并尊重黎巴嫩政府的决定。 @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ Iran's IRGC Navy: Over these two days of the agreement, both the enemy and the friend have experienced and clearly understood that the management of the Strait of Hormuz has entered a new phase.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队海军：在这两天的协议期间，敌友双方都经历并清楚地认识到，霍尔木兹海峡的管理已进入了一个新阶段。

text: Open Source Intel UPDATE 🔴 Islamic regime Fars News: "Until a ceasefire is established in Lebanon, Iran has no plan to participate in peace negotiations in Islamabad with the American side. The Wall Street Journal claimed a few minutes ago in a news report that an Iranian delegation has entered Islamabad to start negotiations with Washington, which is false" NOW: An Iranian delegation led by Abbas Araghchi and Mohammad-Bagher Ghalibaf has arrived in Islamabad for talks with the U.S., according to the Wall Street Journal. - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报更新 🔴 伊斯兰政权法尔斯通讯社：“在黎巴嫩实现停火之前，伊朗没有计划参加在伊斯兰堡与美方的和平谈判。《华尔街日报》几分钟前在一篇新闻报道中声称，一个伊朗代表团已进入伊斯兰堡开始与华盛顿谈判，这是虚假的” 现在：据《华尔街日报》报道，由阿巴斯·阿拉格希和穆罕默德-巴吉尔·卡利巴夫率领的伊朗代表团已抵达伊斯兰堡，与美国进行会谈。 - 开源情报推文

text: Open Source Intel NOW: An Iranian delegation led by Abbas Araghchi and Mohammad-Bagher Ghalibaf has arrived in Islamabad for talks with the U.S., according to the Wall Street Journal. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 现在：据《华尔街日报》报道，由阿巴斯·阿拉格希和穆罕默德-巴吉尔·卡利巴夫率领的伊朗代表团已抵达伊斯兰堡，与美国进行会谈。推文

text: The Spectator Index BREAKING: Trump criticizes WSJ editorial board and says oil will flow 'with or without the help of Iran' https://twitter.com/spectatorindex/status/2042355273004958186/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 观察家指数 快讯：特朗普批评《华尔街日报》编辑委员会，并称石油将“在有或没有伊朗帮助的情况下”流动 https://twitter.com/spectatorindex/status/2042355273004958186/photo/1 推文

text: OSINTtechnical Trump, in a pair of posts tonight: "There are reports that Iran is charging fees to tankers going through the Hormuz Strait — They better not be and, if they are, they better stop now!" "Very quickly, you’ll see Oil start flowing, with or without the help of Iran" tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical 特朗普今晚发布了两条帖子：“有报道称伊朗正在向通过霍尔木兹海峡的油轮收取费用——他们最好不要这样做，如果他们在这样做，他们最好现在就停止！” “很快，你就会看到石油开始流动，无论有没有伊朗的帮助” 推文

text: Open Source Intel Trump: The Wall Street Journal, one of the worst and most inaccurate “Editorial Boards” in the World, stated that I “declared premature victory in Iran.” Actually, it is a Victory, and there’s nothing “premature” about it! Because of me, IRAN WILL NEVER HAVE A NUCLEAR WEAPON and, very quickly, you’ll see Oil start flowing, with or without the help of Iran and, to me, it makes no difference, either way. The Wall Street Journal will, as usual, live to eat their words. They are always quick to criticize, but never to admit when they’re wrong, which is most of the time! President DONALD J. TRUMP tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 特朗普：《华尔街日报》是世界上最糟糕、最不准确的“编辑委员会”之一，它声称我“在伊朗宣布了过早的胜利”。事实上，这是一场胜利，而且没有什么“过早”的！因为我，伊朗永远不会拥有核武器，而且很快，你就会看到石油开始流动，无论有没有伊朗的帮助，对我来说，无论哪种方式都没有区别。《华尔街日报》将一如既往地等着打自己的脸。他们总是急于批评，却从不承认自己错了，而他们大部分时间都是错的！唐纳德·J·特朗普总统 推文

text: OSINTdefender During a phone interview earlier with MS NOW, President Trump claimed that he did not “know anything about” today statement from the White House on late convicted sex offender and trafficker Jeffrey Epstein by First Lady Melania Trump. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 在早些时候与MS NOW的电话采访中，特朗普总统声称他“不知道任何关于”今天白宫关于已故定罪性犯罪者和人口贩运者杰弗里·爱泼斯坦的声明，该声明由第一夫人梅拉尼娅·特朗普发表。推文

text: OSINTtechnical RT @hntrbrkmedia : Update: another one. Moments ago, an LPG tanker turned around while trying to transit the Strait of Hormuz through the Iran-approved route. AIS from @MarineTraffic . https://twitter.com/hntrbrkmedia/status/2042354076529139747/photo/1 New: an oil products tanker attempting to transit the Strait of Hormuz has made an 180 degree turn and is headed back towards the Persian Gulf. AIS from @MarineTraffic. https://twitter.com/hntrbrkmedia/status/2041950317743382744/photo/1 - Hunterbrook tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical 转推 @hntrbrkmedia ：更新：又一艘。片刻前，一艘液化石油气油轮在试图通过伊朗批准的航线穿越霍尔木兹海峡时掉头。来自 @MarineTraffic 的AIS数据。 https://twitter.com/hntrbrkmedia/status/2042354076529139747/photo/1 新消息：一艘试图通过霍尔木兹海峡的成品油轮进行了180度转弯，正驶回波斯湾。来自 @MarineTraffic 的AIS数据。 https://twitter.com/hntrbrkmedia/status/2041950317743382744/photo/1 - Hunterbrook 推文

text: Open Source Intel NEW 🔴 U.S. Border Patrol apprehended four British nationals after they crossed illegally into Maine from Canada through a remote area. The individuals were identified as Ali Mohammed Ali Abdullah, Hameed Mohammed Nagi, Ibrahim Ayyub Khan, and Mohammed Sultan Saleh. @BillMelugin_ tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 新消息 🔴 美国边境巡逻队在四名英国国民从加拿大通过偏远地区非法进入缅因州后将其逮捕。这些人被确认为阿里·穆罕默德·阿里·阿卜杜拉、哈米德·穆罕默德·纳吉、易卜拉欣·阿尤布·汗和穆罕默德·苏丹·萨利赫。 @BillMelugin_ 推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) Ukrainian President Zelensky indicates that Ukraine will adhere to the Easter ceasefire announced by Russia. "Russia has a chance not to return to strikes after Easter," he adds. https://twitter.com/Archer83Able/status/2042352712554070090/photo/1 Russia says Russian President Putin ordered an unilateral ceasefire in the combat zone in Ukraine in connection with the upcoming Orthodox Easter. "We assume that the Ukrainian side will follow the example of the Russian Federation," the statement published by the Kremlin reads. - Status-6 (War & Military News) tweet
text_zh: Status-6（战争与军事新闻） 乌克兰总统泽连斯基表示，乌克兰将遵守俄罗斯宣布的复活节停火。“俄罗斯有机会在复活节后不再恢复打击，”他补充道。 https://twitter.com/Archer83Able/status/2042352712554070090/photo/1 俄罗斯表示，俄罗斯总统普京下令在乌克兰作战区进行单方面停火，以配合即将到来的东正教复活节。“我们假设乌克兰方面将效仿俄罗斯联邦，”克里姆林宫发布的声明写道。 - Status-6（战争与军事新闻） 推文

text: OSINTdefender RT @sentdefender : During an interview this morning ABC News, President Donald J. Trump appeared to endorse a condition by Iran in last night’s ceasefire that allows them to charge tolls on ships transiting the Strait of Hormuz, claiming that the fees may by a “joint venture” between Iran and the United States. “We’re thinking of doing it as a joint venture. It’s a way of securing it - also securing it from lots of other people. It’s a beautiful thing.” tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 转推 @sentdefender ：在今天早上接受美国广播公司新闻采访时，唐纳德·J·特朗普总统似乎支持伊朗昨晚停火协议中的一个条件，即允许他们对通过霍尔木兹海峡的船只收取通行费，并声称这些费用可能是伊朗和美国之间的“合资企业”。“我们正在考虑将其作为合资企业。这是一种确保安全的方式——也可以确保它免受许多其他人的侵害。这是一件美妙的事情。” 推文

text: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 ⚡️ Iran said the reports of the country's delegation arriving in Islamabad are false, and that until the United States fulfills its commitments regarding Lebanon, the negotiations are suspended.
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 ⚡️ 伊朗表示，有关该国代表团抵达伊斯兰堡的报道是虚假的，在美方履行有关黎巴嫩的承诺之前，谈判暂停。

text: ⚡️ 🇦🇺 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 The Australian ambassador in Lebanon, Tom Wilson, donates blood to the wounded of the Israeli aggression in Lebanon yesterday. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇦🇺 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 澳大利亚驻黎巴嫩大使汤姆·威尔逊昨天为黎巴嫩遭受以色列侵略的伤员献血。 @wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 Trump is now crashing out over Wall Street Journal. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 特朗普现在因为《华尔街日报》而崩溃。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇮🇷 An informed source told Tasnim News Agency: Reports by some media outlets claiming that the Iranian negotiating team has entered Islamabad, Pakistan to negotiate with the Americans are completely false. ➡️ He emphasized: As long as the United States does not fulfill its commitment to the ceasefire in Lebanon and the Zionist regime continues its attacks, negotiations remain suspended. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 一位知情人士告诉塔斯尼姆通讯社：一些媒体声称伊朗谈判小组已进入巴基斯坦伊斯兰堡与美国人谈判的报道完全是虚假的。 ➡️ 他强调：只要美国不履行其在黎巴嫩停火的承诺，且犹太复国主义政权继续其袭击，谈判就保持暂停。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: The “Jewish” card doesn’t work anymore bro, no one cares.
text_zh: “犹太”牌已经不管用了，兄弟，没人关心了。

text: 🇮🇱 ⚡️ 🇵🇰 Israeli Foreign Minister Gideon Sa'ar: Israel views very gravely these blatant antisemitic blood libels from a government claiming to “mediate peace.” Calling the Jewish state “cancerous” is effectively calling for its annihilation. Israel will defend itself against terrorists who vow its destruction.
text_zh: 🇮🇱 ⚡️ 🇵🇰 以色列外交部长吉德翁·萨尔：以色列非常严肃地看待这些来自一个声称“调解和平”的政府的公然反犹太血腥诽谤。称犹太国家为“癌变”实际上是在呼吁将其消灭。以色列将保护自己免受那些誓言要摧毁它的恐怖分子的侵害。

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. President Donald Trump on the Wall Street Journal: The Wall Street Journal, one of the worst and most inaccurate “Editorial Boards” in the World, stated that I “declared premature victory in Iran.” Actually, it is a Victory, and there’s nothing “premature” about it! Because of me, IRAN WILL NEVER HAVE A NUCLEAR WEAPON and, very quickly, you’ll see Oil start flowing, with or without the help of Iran and, to me, it makes no difference, either way. The Wall Street Journal will, as usual, live to eat their words. They are always quick to criticize, but never to admit when they’re wrong, which is most of the time! @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普谈《华尔街日报》：《华尔街日报》是世界上最糟糕、最不准确的“编辑委员会”之一，它声称我“在伊朗宣布了过早的胜利”。事实上，这是一场胜利，而且没有什么“过早”的！因为我，伊朗永远不会拥有核武器，而且很快，你就会看到石油开始流动，无论有没有伊朗的帮助，对我来说，无论哪种方式都没有区别。《华尔街日报》将一如既往地等着打自己的脸。他们总是急于批评，却从不承认自己错了，而他们大部分时间都是错的！ @wfwitness

text: 🇵🇰 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 ⚡ Khawaja Asif, Pakistan's Defense Minister on Israeli attacks on Lebanon: "Israel is evil and a curse for humanity, while peace talks are underway in Islamabad, genocide is being committed in Lebanon. Innocent citizens are being killed by Israel, first Gaza, then Iran and now Lebanon, bloodletting continues unabated. I hope and pray people who created this cancerous state on Palestinian land to get rid of European jews burn in hell,"
text_zh: 🇵🇰 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 ⚡ 巴基斯坦国防部长卡瓦贾·阿西夫谈以色列对黎巴嫩的袭击：“以色列是邪恶的，是人类的诅咒，当和平谈判在伊斯兰堡进行时，黎巴嫩正在发生种族灭绝。无辜的公民被以色列杀害，先是加沙，然后是伊朗，现在是黎巴嫩，流血事件持续不断。我希望并祈祷那些在巴勒斯坦土地上建立这个癌变国家以摆脱欧洲犹太人的人下地狱，"

text: WarTranslated Zelensky responded to the Kremlin's statement about the "Easter truce". https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2042352322487988498/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 泽连斯基回应了克里姆林宫关于“复活节休战”的声明。 https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2042352322487988498/photo/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender He’s truly lost it. In a long ranting post earlier on TruthSocial, President Donald J. Trump launched a brutal attack against some of previous strongest supporters, including Conservative commentators Tucker Carlson, Megyn Kelly, Candace Owens, and Alex Jones, who have recently begun to criticize Trump for the Iran War, Epstein Files, and other moves that they consider against his agenda of “MAGA” and “America First.” President Trump, in the post, call the above named commentators, “Low IQs…stupid people..NUT JOBS, TROUBLEMAKERS,” who he says have, “Third Rate Podcasts, but nobody's talking about them, and their views are the opposite of MAGA - Or I wouldn't have won the Presidential Election in a LANDSLIDE. MAGA agrees with me, and just gave CNN a 100% Approval Rating of "TRUMP," not Hand Flailing Fools like Tucker Carlson.” - OSINTdefender tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 他真的疯了。在早些时候TruthSocial上的一篇长篇大论中，唐纳德·J·特朗普总统对一些以前最坚定的支持者发起了残酷的攻击，包括保守派评论员塔克·卡尔森、梅根·凯利、坎迪斯·欧文斯和亚历克斯·琼斯，他们最近开始批评特朗普的伊朗战争、爱泼斯坦档案以及其他他们认为违背其“MAGA”和“美国优先”议程的举动。特朗普总统在帖子中称上述评论员为“低智商……愚蠢的人……疯子、麻烦制造者”，他说他们有“三流播客，但没人谈论他们，他们的观点与MAGA相反——否则我就不会以压倒性优势赢得总统选举。MAGA同意我的观点，刚刚给了CNN 100%的‘特朗普’支持率，而不是像塔克·卡尔森那样挥舞双手的傻瓜。” - OSINTdefender 推文

text: WarMonitor That oughta do it. 🫤 https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2042352023979405327/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 那应该就够了。 🫤 https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2042352023979405327/photo/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender After appearing to express his support for the tolls yesterday, claiming that it could a “joint venture” in the future between Iran and the United States, President Trump has now stated that Iran “better not be” charging fees on tankers transiting the Strait of Hormuz, and if they are “they better stop now!” tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 在昨天似乎表达了对通行费的支持，声称这在未来可能是伊朗和美国之间的“合资企业”之后，特朗普总统现在表示，伊朗“最好不要”对通过霍尔木兹海峡的油轮收取费用，如果他们在这样做，“他们最好现在就停止！” 推文

MAGA agrees with me, and just gave CNN a 100% Approval Rating of "TRUMP," not Hand Flailing Fools like Tucker Carlson.” tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 在早些时候TruthSocial上的一篇长篇大论中，唐纳德·J·特朗普总统对一些以前最坚定的支持者发起了残酷的攻击，包括保守派评论员塔克·卡尔森、梅根·凯利、坎迪斯·欧文斯和亚历克斯·琼斯，他们最近开始批评特朗普的伊朗战争、爱泼斯坦档案以及其他他们认为违背其“MAGA”和“美国优先”议程的举动。特朗普总统在帖子中称上述评论员为“低智商……愚蠢的人……疯子、麻烦制造者”，他说他们有“三流播客，但没人谈论他们，他们的观点与MAGA相反——否则我就不会以压倒性优势赢得总统选举。MAGA同意我的观点，刚刚给了CNN 100%的‘特朗普’支持率，而不是像塔克·卡尔森那样挥舞双手的傻瓜。” 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇷🇺🇺🇦 Russian President Putin has declared a ceasefire in connection with the approaching Orthodox Easter. Russia expects Ukraine to follow its example. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇦 🇷🇺 Ukrainian President Zelenskyy says Ukraine will respect the Easter ceasefire, he claims was proposed by Ukraine. @wfwitness

President DONALD J. TRUMP" @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 Chairman of Iran's National Security Commission on the Strait of Hormuz: "No vessel passes through the strait without the permission and authorization of our armed forces." Legislation is advancing to formally establish Iran's absolute sovereignty over the strait, but it is almost enacted on the groud. "The strait is completely under control, under surveillance. All movements and passages are under the strict, precise, and calculated control of our armed forces." 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 伊朗国家安全委员会主席谈霍尔木兹海峡：“没有船只可以在未经我们武装部队许可和授权的情况下通过海峡。”立法正在推进，以正式确立伊朗对海峡的绝对主权，但这在地面上几乎已经实施。“海峡完全处于控制之下，处于监视之下。所有的移动和通行都处于我们武装部队严格、精确和经过计算的控制之下。” 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇮🇷 "Time is running out" - Iranian Parliament Speaker and potential negotiator, Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf, reposted Iranian conditions for a ceasefire. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 “时间不多了” - 伊朗议会议长兼潜在谈判代表穆罕默德·巴吉尔·卡利巴夫转发了伊朗的停火条件。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Zelensky: Ukraine has repeatedly stated that we are ready for mirror steps. We proposed a ceasefire for the Easter holidays this year and will act accordingly. People need an Easter without threats and a real movement towards peace, and Russia has a chance not to return to strikes after Easter.
text_zh: 泽连斯基：乌克兰已多次声明我们准备采取对等步骤。我们提议今年复活节停火，并将据此行事。人们需要一个没有威胁的复活节，需要真正迈向和平，俄罗斯有机会在复活节后不再恢复打击。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇵🇰 The Israeli Prime Minister's Office and Foreign Affairs Minister Gideon Sa'ar strongly condemned the Pakistani Defence Minister's social media post describing Israel as "cancerous," labeling the remarks as antisemitic blood libels and an intolerable call for the nation's annihilation. The Prime Minister Office's firmly rejected Pakistan's credibility as a neutral peace mediator in light of the hostile rhetoric. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇵🇰 以色列总理办公室和外交部长吉德翁·萨尔强烈谴责巴基斯坦国防部长描述以色列为“癌变”的社交媒体帖子，将这些言论标记为反犹太血腥诽谤和不可容忍的灭国呼吁。总理办公室坚决拒绝巴基斯坦作为中立和平调解人的可信度，鉴于其敌对言论。 @wfwitness

text: Cuba's President Miguel Díaz-Canel: Concept of stepping down is not a part of our vocabulary.
text_zh: 古巴总统米格尔·迪亚斯-卡内尔：下台的概念不在我们的词汇中。

text: Netanyahu’s Office: Pakistan Defence Minister’s call for Israel’s annihilation is outrageous. This is not a statement that can be tolerated from any government, especially not from one that claims to be a neutral arbiter for peace.
text_zh: 内塔尼亚胡办公室：巴基斯坦国防部长呼吁消灭以色列是令人愤慨的。这不是任何政府可以容忍的声明，尤其是那些声称是中立和平仲裁者的政府。

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. President Trump attacked former allies in a TruthSocial post for criticizing the conflict with Iran, calling them low IQ. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国总统特朗普在TruthSocial帖子中攻击前盟友，因为他们批评与伊朗的冲突，称他们智商低。 @wfwitness

text: A large group of chimpanzees in Uganda’s Kibale National Park split into two rival factions, sparking a deadly conflict, according to a study in Science. The group—once about 200 strong—lived cooperatively for decades, but began dividing around 2015 after key social males died and a new alpha rose to power. By 2018, the split was complete, with no remaining social ties. The two groups then turned violent. The smaller faction launched coordinated attacks, killing adult males and later targeting infants. At least 24 chimpanzees have died so far, though the true number is likely higher. The violence is still ongoing. Source: WSJ
text_zh: 据《科学》杂志的一项研究，乌干达基巴莱国家公园的一大群黑猩猩分裂成两个敌对派系，引发了致命的冲突。这个曾经有约200只黑猩猩的群体几十年来一直合作生活，但在2015年左右，随着关键的社会雄性死亡和新的阿尔法雄性掌权，群体开始分裂。到2018年，分裂完成，没有任何社会联系。这两个群体随后变得暴力。较小的派系发动了协同攻击，杀死了成年雄性，后来又以幼崽为目标。到目前为止，至少有24只黑猩猩死亡，尽管真实数字可能更高。暴力仍在继续。来源：《华尔街日报》
